notes: Mouse control overrides keyboard input entirely (paddle.x is always set to mouseX position after keyboard movement), making arrow keys/WASD effectively non-functional; brick layout has slight right-side overflow but game is otherwise complete with proper collision, lives, scoring, and win/lose states.

A visually accurate and highly playable Breakout clone via mouse, but keyboard movement is completely broken because the paddle position is unconditionally overwritten by the mouse coordinates every frame.
Core Breakout loop exists, but the ball is not actually launched on a new game start and mouse movement overrides keyboard paddle control every frame, making controls and flow notably flawed.
